expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly enumerates the case focus items under “Additionally, this specific benchmark focus must be explicitly covered by shipment checkpoints”: “Panel-stack composition”, “Embedding lifecycle boundaries”, “Visible failure or recovery outcomes”. It also reiterates these in “Checkpoint-enforcement assessment” items 2–4, even though it states verification is not possible due to missing artifacts.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “Phase 5b (Shipment Checkpoint) Benchmark Result” and the “What this benchmark requires (phase5b-aligned)” section lists phase5b contract outputs (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b_r<round>) and phase5b disposition routing. execution_notes.md also states: “Verified the Phase 5b contract requires checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, and qa_plan_phase5b_r<round> outputs”.
